expectations.text: Uses jekyll-picture-tag plugin (or equivalent responsive image solution)
Gemfile includes version pin for the plugin (e.g., ~> 2.1)
Configuration includes WebP format with fallback
expectations.evidence: Lines 37-42: webp config with enabled: true

expectations.text: Configuration includes multiple widths for srcset (at least 480, 800, 1200)
Includes lazy loading attribute in configuration
expectations.evidence: Lines 52-55: lazyload config with enabled: true

expectations.text: Notes about LCP optimization for above-the-fold images
expectations.evidence: Lines 170-204: preload LCP image, and conditional lazy loading

expectations.text: Mentions Netlify build pipeline (no extra setup needed)

eval_feedback.overall: Sin skill: falta version pin pero otherwise muy completo
